summary: UI redesign testing complete for D&D DM Screen app ('Rookie Quest / TTRPG Companion' design). All 16 frontend tests pass (4 auth + 5 campaign + 7 dashboard). All 35 backend API tests pass (100%). Fixed backend bug where dm_rules:null caused ResponseValidationError. New design verified: dark navy background (#030014), glowing blue borders, green primary buttons, red secondary buttons, pill-shaped buttons.
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign verified: Dark navy background #030014, glowing blue borders (#4a7dff), green primary buttons (#22c55e), red secondary buttons (#ef4444), pill-shaped buttons (border-radius: 50px). All 8 dashboard tabs working. Auth flow (login/register) working. Campaign CRUD working. Fixed backend bug: added null-check for dm_rules and content fields in campaign setting endpoints.

features_tested.auth_login_page_design: PASS - Login form with glowing blue borders, green login button, red register button
features_tested.auth_register_flow: PASS - Registration form, validation, redirect to campaigns
features_tested.campaigns_list_page: PASS - New card styling, Rookie Quest logo visible
features_tested.campaign_create: PASS - Modal with form, TTRPG system selector
features_tested.campaign_dashboard_tabs: PASS - All 8 tabs visible (Setting, Gods, NPCs, Locations, Players, Combat Creator, Calendar, In-Game Notes)
features_tested.campaign_setting_tab: PASS - Save content, AI assistant panel
features_tested.tab_navigation: PASS - All tabs clickable and render content
features_tested.back_navigation: PASS - Back button returns to campaigns list

design_verification.glow_blue: #4a7dff - Blue glow effects on panels confirmed

bug_fixes_applied.dm_rules_null_validation: Fixed ResponseValidationError when dm_rules is null in MongoDB by adding null-checks in get_campaign_setting and update_campaign_setting endpoints
